checkpoint_scores.title: Clear architectural pattern
checkpoint_scores.description: Project follows a recognizable architectural style.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Define and document a primary architecture and align new code to it.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Architecture is documented or strongly encoded in repo structure.

checkpoint_scores.title: Separation of concerns
checkpoint_scores.description: UI, domain, and infrastructure responsibilities are not mixed.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Split mixed modules so each layer owns one concern.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Domain and service layers suggest separation of concerns.

checkpoint_scores.title: Dependency direction
checkpoint_scores.description: Core domain logic does not depend directly on infrastructure details.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Invert dependencies so domain code depends on interfaces, not adapters.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Repo structure suggests directional dependency boundaries.

checkpoint_scores.title: Explicit boundaries between modules/packages
checkpoint_scores.description: Module responsibilities and package boundaries are clearly enforced.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Introduce explicit package boundaries and tighten imports.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Apps/packages structure gives explicit module boundaries.

checkpoint_scores.title: State management clarity
checkpoint_scores.description: State ownership and update paths are obvious.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Centralize or clearly document state ownership and transitions.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: State containers or state modules are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Side effects isolation
checkpoint_scores.description: I/O and other side effects are kept out of core logic.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Push side effects to adapters or service boundaries.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Service-oriented modules suggest side effects are separated.

checkpoint_scores.title: Predictable data flow
checkpoint_scores.description: Data moves through the system in a traceable, consistent way.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Standardize request and event flow so state changes are easy to trace.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Flow control modules exist for predictable data movement.

checkpoint_scores.title: Explicit error propagation strategy
checkpoint_scores.description: Errors are surfaced through a consistent mechanism.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Adopt a single error-handling pattern and document it.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Error handling constructs are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: No circular dependencies
checkpoint_scores.description: Modules do not form dependency cycles.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Break cycles by extracting shared abstractions or reorganizing modules.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No local import cycles detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: No hidden global state
checkpoint_scores.description: Behavior is not driven by implicit mutable globals.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Replace hidden globals with explicit dependencies or configuration.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Config and module boundaries reduce the risk of hidden global state.

checkpoint_scores.title: Consistent style
checkpoint_scores.description: Formatting and style conventions are consistently applied.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Adopt and enforce one style guide across the repo.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Lint or workflow signals suggest consistent style enforcement.

checkpoint_scores.title: Clear naming
checkpoint_scores.description: Variables, functions, and modules use precise names.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Rename ambiguous identifiers to reflect intent and scope.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Naming quality requires human judgment; static scan gives a neutral draft.

checkpoint_scores.title: Function size discipline
checkpoint_scores.description: Functions remain focused and reasonably small.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Split large functions into smaller units with single purposes.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Several large functions suggest weak function-size discipline.

checkpoint_scores.title: Minimal duplication
checkpoint_scores.description: Logic is not copy-pasted across the codebase.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Extract repeated logic into shared helpers or modules.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Duplication is hard to measure reliably without semantic analysis; using a neutral draft score.

checkpoint_scores.title: No dead code
checkpoint_scores.description: Unused code paths and files are removed.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Delete unreachable code and unused assets instead of leaving them dormant.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: High TODO/FIXME count increases dead-code and unfinished-path risk.

checkpoint_scores.title: No commented-out logic
checkpoint_scores.description: Inactive code is not left commented in source files.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Remove commented code and rely on version control history.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No obvious commented-out logic patterns detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: Minimal magic constants
checkpoint_scores.description: Important numeric or string literals are named and centralized.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Promote repeated literals to named constants with intent.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Magic constant usage is difficult to score statically without language-aware parsing.

checkpoint_scores.title: Proper typing
checkpoint_scores.description: Type boundaries are explicit and loosely typed escape hatches are limited.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Tighten boundary contracts and remove broad dynamic types.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Type discipline is supported by TypeScript usage and limited any usage.

checkpoint_scores.title: No TODO landmines
checkpoint_scores.description: Deferred work is tracked intentionally instead of left inline without ownership.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Convert risky TODOs into tracked issues or complete them.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: TODO/FIXME density suggests deferred-risk landmines.

checkpoint_scores.title: Commit hygiene / readable diffs
checkpoint_scores.description: Changes are organized into reviewable commits and diffs.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Split broad changes into focused commits and smaller PRs.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Commit history shows multiple reviewable units.

checkpoint_scores.title: Edge case handling
checkpoint_scores.description: Known edge cases are identified and handled deliberately.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Enumerate edge cases and add explicit handling for them.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Test presence suggests some edge-case coverage.

checkpoint_scores.title: Input validation coverage
checkpoint_scores.description: Inputs are validated before core logic relies on them.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add validation at trust boundaries and reject malformed input early.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Validation constructs are present at boundaries.

checkpoint_scores.title: Explicit null/undefined handling
checkpoint_scores.description: Nullable or missing values are handled intentionally.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Make absent values explicit and guard every nullable path.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Null handling needs code review; static scan assigns a cautious middle score.

checkpoint_scores.title: Async error handling correctness
checkpoint_scores.description: Async operations propagate failures correctly.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Handle async failures explicitly and avoid swallowed errors.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Async/error-handling constructs are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Race condition risk addressed
checkpoint_scores.description: Concurrency hazards are identified and controlled.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Protect shared state and sequence-sensitive operations.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Concurrency controls are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Idempotency where needed
checkpoint_scores.description: Repeatable operations behave safely under retries.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add idempotency keys or dedupe logic for retryable flows.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Idempotency or dedupe logic is present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Deterministic behavior under retries
checkpoint_scores.description: Retries do not create inconsistent outcomes.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Define retry semantics and make side effects retry-safe.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Retry and idempotency signals suggest deterministic retry behavior.

checkpoint_scores.title: No hidden mutation side effects
checkpoint_scores.description: Mutations are visible and do not surprise callers.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Reduce shared mutable state and return new values where practical.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Mutation side effects are difficult to score statically without deeper semantic analysis.

checkpoint_scores.title: Clear invariants
checkpoint_scores.description: Critical assumptions are defined and enforced.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Document invariants and assert them at boundaries.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Schemas or validators suggest explicit invariants.

checkpoint_scores.title: No timing hacks as control flow
checkpoint_scores.description: Behavior does not depend on fragile sleeps or timing tricks.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Replace timing-based coordination with explicit signals or retries.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Timing-based control flow signals were detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: Secrets management
checkpoint_scores.description: Secrets are not committed and are handled through secure mechanisms.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Move secrets to a managed store and rotate any exposed credentials.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No hardcoded secret patterns detected and env examples exist.

checkpoint_scores.title: Proper environment separation
checkpoint_scores.description: Environments are isolated with distinct config and access patterns.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Separate dev, staging, and prod credentials and config paths.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Env examples and environment-specific infrastructure signals exist.

checkpoint_scores.title: Auth flow correctness
checkpoint_scores.description: Authentication paths are complete and resistant to common failure modes.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Review auth flows end to end and close token/session gaps.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Auth-related modules and tests are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Authorization enforced server-side
checkpoint_scores.description: Access control checks are enforced on trusted server boundaries.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Move authorization checks to server-side policy enforcement.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Server-side permission or policy constructs are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Input sanitization
checkpoint_scores.description: Untrusted inputs are sanitized or encoded appropriately.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Apply context-appropriate sanitization and output encoding.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Validation/sanitization signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: No client-side-only trust
checkpoint_scores.description: Security decisions are not delegated solely to the client.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Revalidate client assertions on trusted backend paths.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Backend authz signals reduce client-only trust risk.

checkpoint_scores.title: Dependency vulnerability awareness
checkpoint_scores.description: Dependency risk is monitored and acted on.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Track dependency advisories and patch vulnerable packages promptly.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Lockfiles and CI provide a base for vulnerability hygiene.

checkpoint_scores.title: Rate limiting / abuse controls where relevant
checkpoint_scores.description: Abuse protections exist for exposed, high-risk surfaces.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add rate limits, quotas, or anti-abuse controls on exposed endpoints.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Rate limiting or throttling signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Secure default configs
checkpoint_scores.description: Default configuration values fail closed where possible.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Harden defaults so insecure settings require explicit opt-in.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Guardrails or explicit config examples suggest safer defaults.

checkpoint_scores.title: CORS not over-permissive
checkpoint_scores.description: Cross-origin access is scoped narrowly to intended origins.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Restrict CORS policies to the minimum required origins and methods.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No wildcard CORS configuration was detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: Avoid obvious N+1
checkpoint_scores.description: The system avoids repeated avoidable per-item work on hot paths.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Batch or prefetch data to remove obvious N+1 behavior.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: N+1 behavior requires data-flow review; static scan assigns a cautious middle score.

checkpoint_scores.title: Avoid unbounded memory growth
checkpoint_scores.description: Memory usage is bounded during normal and peak operation.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add caps, streaming, or eviction policies for large workloads.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Memory-bound behavior needs runtime analysis; static scan uses a neutral draft.

checkpoint_scores.title: Avoid unnecessary re-renders
checkpoint_scores.description: Frontend render work is controlled where applicable.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Reduce avoidable renders by stabilizing state flow and component boundaries.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Frontend state organization can reduce unnecessary re-renders.

checkpoint_scores.title: Avoid blocking I/O on hot paths
checkpoint_scores.description: Latency-sensitive paths do not block on slow synchronous I/O.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Move blocking work off hot paths or make it asynchronous.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Hot-path blocking I/O needs profiling; static scan assigns a neutral draft.

checkpoint_scores.title: Bundle size sanity
checkpoint_scores.description: Delivered bundles remain proportionate to user needs.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Audit large dependencies and trim client payloads.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Front-end packaging exists, but bundle governance is not strongly evidenced.

checkpoint_scores.title: Caching strategy where needed
checkpoint_scores.description: Caching is used intentionally for repeated expensive work.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Introduce scoped caching with invalidation rules where it pays off.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Caching signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Backpressure handling where needed
checkpoint_scores.description: The system degrades safely under load instead of queueing forever.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add bounded queues, backpressure, or load-shedding policies.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Backpressure or queue-bound controls are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Efficient data structures
checkpoint_scores.description: Core paths use data structures that fit their access patterns.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Replace poorly matched structures on hot paths with better-fitting ones.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Data-structure choices need code-level review; static scan uses a cautious middle score.

checkpoint_scores.title: Cold start sensitivity addressed
checkpoint_scores.description: Startup latency is considered for serverless or short-lived runtimes.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Reduce startup work or prewarm critical paths where needed.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Cold-start sensitivity is acknowledged in code or docs.

checkpoint_scores.title: Concurrency behavior understood
checkpoint_scores.description: Concurrency limits and behavior are known and intentionally configured.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Document and tune concurrency settings for expected workloads.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Concurrency settings or controls are visible.

checkpoint_scores.title: Structured logging
checkpoint_scores.description: Logs are machine-parseable and consistent.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Emit structured logs with stable fields for key events.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Structured logging signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Meaningful error messages
checkpoint_scores.description: Errors are actionable for operators and developers.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Improve error messages with context, cause, and next action.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Error handling paths exist; error-message quality still needs review.

checkpoint_scores.title: Metrics for critical paths
checkpoint_scores.description: Critical user or system flows have measurable metrics.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Instrument latency, throughput, and error metrics on key paths.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Metrics or telemetry instrumentation is present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Health checks
checkpoint_scores.description: Health or readiness probes exist where the system needs them.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add targeted health checks for dependencies and service readiness.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Health or readiness checks are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: No silent failures
checkpoint_scores.description: Failures are surfaced to operators instead of disappearing.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Convert silent catch blocks into explicit logging or error handling.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No silent-failure anti-patterns were detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: Correlation IDs / request tracing
checkpoint_scores.description: Cross-service requests can be traced end to end where applicable.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Propagate correlation IDs through request and job boundaries.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Tracing or correlation ID signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Alertability
checkpoint_scores.description: There is a clear signal for incidents that should page an operator.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Define alert conditions tied to actionable user or system impact.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Alerting or incident keywords are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: SLO thinking
checkpoint_scores.description: Latency and reliability targets are defined or at least considered.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Establish practical service objectives for critical paths.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: SLO or error-budget thinking appears in docs/code.

checkpoint_scores.title: Crash-safe behavior / graceful shutdown
checkpoint_scores.description: The system handles crashes or shutdowns without corrupting state.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add graceful shutdown hooks and protect in-flight work.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Graceful shutdown handling is present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Feature flags or safe rollout mechanisms
checkpoint_scores.description: Risky changes can be rolled out progressively where applicable.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Introduce feature flags or staged rollout controls for risky changes.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Feature flag or rollout control signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Unit tests for business logic
checkpoint_scores.description: Core business rules are covered by unit tests.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add fast unit tests around business-critical logic.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Unit-style tests are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Integration tests for boundaries
checkpoint_scores.description: Key boundary interactions are covered by integration tests.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add integration tests around databases, queues, and external APIs.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No integration test signals were detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: E2E tests for critical flows
checkpoint_scores.description: Critical user journeys are validated end to end.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Automate end-to-end checks for the highest-value workflows.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: E2E or browser-flow tests are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Deterministic test setup
checkpoint_scores.description: Tests run from a controlled and reproducible setup.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Remove hidden environmental dependencies from test setup.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Deterministic test setup is not strongly evidenced.

checkpoint_scores.title: No flaky tests
checkpoint_scores.description: Tests pass reliably without intermittent failures.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Eliminate timing and shared-state causes of flaky tests.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No explicit flaky-test signal detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: Test coverage of error paths
checkpoint_scores.description: Failure paths are explicitly tested, not just happy paths.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add tests for validation errors, retries, and downstream failures.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Error-path test coverage is not strongly visible.

checkpoint_scores.title: Mocks not leaking abstractions
checkpoint_scores.description: Mocks support behavior verification without distorting the real design.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Use thinner mocks or more integration tests at abstraction boundaries.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Mocking strategy quality is unclear from static analysis.

checkpoint_scores.title: Regression tests for known bugs
checkpoint_scores.description: Past defects are captured in repeatable tests.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add a regression test whenever a production bug is fixed.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Regression tests or bug-focused tests are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Performance tests
checkpoint_scores.description: Performance-sensitive systems have relevant load or benchmark coverage.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add targeted performance checks for critical throughput or latency paths.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Performance or benchmark tests are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Security tests / basic checks
checkpoint_scores.description: Basic security behaviors are validated with tests or automated checks.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add security-focused validation for auth, access, and input handling.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Security-focused tests or checks are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Clear README
checkpoint_scores.description: The repo explains what it is, how to run it, and how to contribute.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Expand the README with setup, usage, and operational notes.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: README is present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Setup reproducibility
checkpoint_scores.description: New contributors can reproduce setup with minimal tribal knowledge.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Automate setup steps and remove manual drift-prone instructions.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Bootstrap or setup scripts improve reproducibility.

checkpoint_scores.title: Env var documentation
checkpoint_scores.description: Required configuration is documented with clear defaults or examples.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Document every required environment variable and its purpose.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Environment example files are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Linting + formatting enforced
checkpoint_scores.description: Formatting and lint checks are automated and expected.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add lint and format checks to local workflows and CI.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: CI or workflow signals suggest lint/format enforcement can run automatically.

checkpoint_scores.title: CI pipeline exists
checkpoint_scores.description: A continuous integration pipeline validates core quality signals.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add CI that runs the minimum reliable test and lint suite.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: CI pipeline files are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Build reproducibility
checkpoint_scores.description: Build outputs can be reproduced from source consistently.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Pin build inputs and document reproducible build steps.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Lockfiles and setup scripts support reproducible builds.

checkpoint_scores.title: Deployment strategy clear
checkpoint_scores.description: Deployment flow and ownership are documented clearly.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Document how releases are promoted and who owns each step.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Deploy scripts or infrastructure code describe deployment.

checkpoint_scores.title: Versioning discipline
checkpoint_scores.description: Releases follow a consistent versioning approach.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Adopt and enforce a documented versioning policy.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Versioning signals exist in manifests or docs.

checkpoint_scores.title: DB migrations strategy
checkpoint_scores.description: Database schema changes follow a safe, repeatable process where relevant.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Adopt versioned migrations and document rollback expectations.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Migration tooling or files are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Rollback capability
checkpoint_scores.description: There is a practical path to revert a bad release.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Define and test a rollback path before shipping risky changes.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Rollback capability is not clearly documented.

checkpoint_scores.title: No overuse of libs for trivial logic
checkpoint_scores.description: Trivial problems are not solved with unnecessary dependencies.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Remove low-value dependencies and keep simple logic in-house.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Dependency footprint may be heavy for the amount of source code.

checkpoint_scores.title: No needless abstraction depth
checkpoint_scores.description: Abstractions exist to serve real complexity, not imagined future needs.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Collapse indirection layers that do not buy flexibility.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Repo structure hints at unnecessary abstraction or indirection.

checkpoint_scores.title: Domain model clarity
checkpoint_scores.description: The domain model is visible and maps cleanly to the problem space.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Make domain concepts explicit in types, modules, and language.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Domain-specific modules are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Consistent architecture across files
checkpoint_scores.description: Architectural patterns are applied consistently throughout the repo.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Standardize file patterns and refactor outliers toward them.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Repo structure is consistent across major areas.

checkpoint_scores.title: Folder structure is coherent
checkpoint_scores.description: Repository structure reflects system boundaries and is navigable.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Reorganize folders so related code lives together predictably.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Folder structure is reasonably coherent at the top level.

checkpoint_scores.title: Utility modules not dumping ground
checkpoint_scores.description: Shared helpers remain focused instead of becoming miscellaneous buckets.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Split catch-all utility files into domain-specific modules.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Large utility/helper files suggest dumping-ground risk.

checkpoint_scores.title: Decision records for complex choices
checkpoint_scores.description: Important technical decisions are documented and traceable.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Capture major design decisions in lightweight ADRs or equivalent notes.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: No ADR/decision-record signals were detected.

checkpoint_scores.title: PRs not entire app in one commit
checkpoint_scores.description: Changes are reviewed in focused increments instead of giant dumps.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Break work into smaller reviewable slices with clear intent.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Commit history suggests work was split over multiple commits.

checkpoint_scores.title: Typed boundaries at API layer
checkpoint_scores.description: API contracts are explicit and validated at boundaries.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Define and enforce request and response schemas at API edges.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Schemas or typed models exist at boundaries.

checkpoint_scores.title: No works on my machine config
checkpoint_scores.description: Local configuration is portable and does not rely on one developer environment.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Remove machine-specific assumptions from setup and runtime config.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Setup automation reduces machine-specific drift.

checkpoint_scores.title: Prompt/versioning if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI prompts or orchestration logic are versioned where relevant.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Version prompts and record the variants deployed to production.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Prompt assets are versioned in the repo.

checkpoint_scores.title: Model version pinning if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI model identifiers are pinned instead of floating silently.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Pin model versions and document upgrade review steps.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Model identifiers or versions appear explicitly in code/docs.

checkpoint_scores.title: Output validation if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI-generated outputs are validated before being trusted.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Validate model outputs against schemas or business rules.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Output validation signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Temperature/config explicit if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI runtime settings are explicit and reviewable.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Make model parameters explicit in code or config.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Model temperature/config appears explicitly configured.

checkpoint_scores.title: Guardrails/fallbacks if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI features fail safely and degrade gracefully when needed.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add fallback behavior and guardrails for unsafe or failed model responses.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Guardrails or fallback paths are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: Token/cost awareness if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI usage cost and token consumption are measured and bounded.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Track token usage and cap expensive calls where practical.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Token/cost awareness is visible in code or docs.

checkpoint_scores.title: Latency budgets if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI-dependent features have explicit latency expectations.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Define latency budgets and design around them.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Latency budgets are mentioned explicitly.

checkpoint_scores.title: Audit logging if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: AI actions and high-risk outputs are logged for review.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Record auditable logs for AI decisions and tool actions.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Audit logging signals are present.

checkpoint_scores.title: No blind trust in model outputs if AI used
checkpoint_scores.description: Model outputs are treated as untrusted input.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Add verification, policy checks, or human review for risky model output.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Validation/guardrails reduce blind trust in model outputs.

checkpoint_scores.title: Clear support boundaries if automating external UIs
checkpoint_scores.description: Operational ownership and support limits are defined for fragile automations.
checkpoint_scores.remediation_hint: Document what UI automations are supported and where operators intervene.
checkpoint_scores.assessment_rationale: Playbooks or automation docs define support boundaries.

top_issues.title: No timing hacks as control flow
top_issues.remediation_hint: Replace timing-based coordination with explicit signals or retries.

top_issues.title: Integration tests for boundaries
top_issues.remediation_hint: Add integration tests around databases, queues, and external APIs.

top_issues.title: No dead code
top_issues.remediation_hint: Delete unreachable code and unused assets instead of leaving them dormant.

top_issues.title: Utility modules not dumping ground
top_issues.remediation_hint: Split catch-all utility files into domain-specific modules.

top_issues.title: Decision records for complex choices
top_issues.remediation_hint: Capture major design decisions in lightweight ADRs or equivalent notes.

top_issues.title: No TODO landmines
top_issues.remediation_hint: Convert risky TODOs into tracked issues or complete them.

top_issues.title: No works on my machine config
top_issues.remediation_hint: Remove machine-specific assumptions from setup and runtime config.

top_issues.title: Function size discipline
top_issues.remediation_hint: Split large functions into smaller units with single purposes.

top_issues.title: Test coverage of error paths
top_issues.remediation_hint: Add tests for validation errors, retries, and downstream failures.

top_issues.title: Rollback capability
top_issues.remediation_hint: Define and test a rollback path before shipping risky changes.
